headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Costco or Walmart 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Today
summary: Retail giants Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ: COST) and Walmart (NASDAQ: WMT) have taken very different paths over the past decade. Costco doubled down on its membership-driven warehouse model, turning Kirkland Signature into a private-label powerhouse and expanding internationally. Walmart reinvented itself, pivoting from a big-box stalwart into an omnichannel platform with a growing advertising business, AI-driven ...
